name: arduview-hero-9x16
_note: 9:16 vertical hero for paid social (TikTok/Reels/Stories). PORTRAIT-native clips only. This is where the real gameplay footage lives (Pong, SPACE BATTLE). HDR clips tone-mapped to SDR. Silent, no captions.

segments.beat: OPEN — transparency: rotation showing PCB/battery through the clear shell
DISPLAY — see-through display lit with blue pixel content, board visible behind the pane
GAMES — live Pong/paddle gameplay running on the transparent display (the payoff)
GAME TITLE — 'SPACE BATTLE / TRENCH RUN' title screen, readable retro game UI through the glass
PLAY — fingers on D-pad/A-B with lit display, hands-on gaming + pocket scale
CLOSE — rotation transparency reveal, PCB through shell
